title: SEMI JOIN returns incorrect results
description:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
``` sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 NUMERIC UNSIGNED ZEROFILL , c1 DECIMAL UNSIGNED  AS (c0) VIRTUAL NOT NULL UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE t1 LIKE t0;
INSERT IGNORE  INTO t1(c0) VALUES (278315979), (-1662611842);
INSERT IGNORE  INTO t1(c0) VALUES (233157952), (-1526658956), (1657263820) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c0=NULL;
REPLACE INTO t0(c0) VALUES (95226653);
```
``` sql
SELECT * FROM t0;
    c0    |    c1
----------+----------
 95226653 | 95226653
```
``` sql
SELECT * FROM t1;
     c0     |     c1
------------+------------
 0          | 0
 233157952  | 233157952
 278315979  | 278315979
 1657263820 | 1657263820

```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
``` sql
SELECT t1.c0, t1.c1 FROM  t1  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t0 WHERE t1.c0 < t0.c0); 
     c0     |     c1
------------+------------
 278315979  | 278315979
 233157952  | 233157952
 1657263820 | 1657263820
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
``` sql
SELECT t1.c0, t1.c1 FROM  t1  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t0 WHERE t1.c0 < t0.c0); 
     c0     |     c1
------------+------------
 278315979  | 278315979
 0          | 0
 233157952  | 233157952
 1657263820 | 1657263820
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
```
                      tidb_version()
-----------------------------------------------------------
 Release Version: v8.2.0                                  +
 Edition: Community                                       +
 Git Commit Hash: 821e491a20fbab36604b36b647b5bae26a2c1418+
 Git Branch: HEAD                                         +
 UTC Build Time: 2024-07-05 09:16:25                      +
 GoVersion: go1.21.10                                     +
 Race Enabled: false                                      +
 Check Table Before Drop: false                           +
 Store: tikv
```
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 NUMERIC UNSIGNED ZEROFILL , c1 DECIMAL UNSIGNED  AS (c0) VIRTUAL NOT NULL UNIQUE);
INSERT IGNORE  INTO t1(c0) VALUES (233157952), (-1526658956), (1657263820) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c0=NULL;
key_bug_features: SEMI JOIN with NOT EXISTS returns incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, c2 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 FLOAT, c1 BOOLEAN, c2 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t3(c0, c1) VALUES (1.5, TRUE), (2.5, FALSE), (3.5, NULL);
SELECT t2.c0, t2.c1 FROM t2 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t3 WHERE t2.c0 < t3.c0);
